text:
Catheter This field is checked if the patient had indwelling/suprapubic catheter prior to the inpatient stay or change in medical or treatment regimen within the past 14 days. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x
M1018_PR_DISRUPT M1018 (M0220) Prior Condition- Disruptive Behavior This field is checked if the patient had disruptive or socially inappropriate behavior prior to the inpatient stay or change in medical or treatment regimen within the past 14 days. 0 = Not Checked
